pr.title: Record: 11L VRL + LeakyReLU² + Full GPTQ (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1175)

output.summary: Combines sigmoid-gated Value Residual Learning, LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLPs, and Full GPTQ-aware quantization within an 11-layer model with EMA/SWA.
techniques: VRL adds layer0 value outputs to later layers via learned sigmoid gates
LeakyReLU(0.5)² keeps MLP gradients flowing in both directions
Full GPTQ int6 with EMA/SWA-aligned late QAT and compression pruning
